message:
test(pt-core): extend pattern learning coverage with 47 new inline tests (process_triage-aii.7)

Cover SpecificityLevel priorities, PatternCandidate name generation,
CommandNormalizer (process name normalization for versioned interpreters,
arg normalization at exact/standard/broad levels, is_significant_arg,
is_key_arg, is_primary_flag classification), candidate generation edge
cases (empty cmdline, command-only, broad base name), DecisionAction
equality, PatternLearner (observation tracking, min_observations config,
pattern creation at threshold, pattern reuse, clear_observations,
infer_category for all categories, mixed action preference for broader
patterns), Default trait, and error display. Total: 51 tests (was 4).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
